prompt:
Implement the architecture defined in artifactforge-design/MCRS_pipeline_spec_detailed.md.

Steps:
	1	Read the markdown spec and extract all agent roles, schemas, and workflow rules.
	2	Create an implementation plan and save it to docs/implementation-plan.md.
	3	Scaffold the project structure:
	◦	src/agents/
	◦	src/schemas/
	◦	src/coordinator/
	◦	src/pipeline/
	◦	tests/
	4	Implement:
	◦	All agent interfaces
	◦	JSON schemas for artifacts
	◦	Coordinator orchestration logic
	◦	Revision loops (reviewer → writer, verifier → writer, arbiter → coordinator)
	◦	Blocking gates for failures
	5	Add tests for:
	◦	schema validation
	◦	pipeline execution
	◦	revision loops
	◦	arbiter blocking behavior
	6	Add a runnable example:
	◦	input → full pipeline → final output
	7	Update README.md with usage instructions


Constraints:
	•	Do NOT collapse all logic into one agent
	•	Do NOT skip revision loops or gates
	•	Do NOT invent behavior not in spec
	•	Preserve strict separation of responsibilities


Implementation rules:
	•	Treat each agent in the spec as a distinct module/component
	•	Do NOT merge multiple agents into one class or function
	•	Do NOT collapse pipeline stages
	•	Preserve explicit artifact passing between agents
	•	Maintain strict schema boundaries between stages
	•	Implement revision loops exactly as defined


Completion Criteria:
	•	Code compiles/runs
	•	Tests pass
	•	Example pipeline works end-to-end
	•	README explains usage


Output <promise>COMPLETE</promise> only when everything is implemented and working.
